abilities: Come and get it, lavvy heids.
Wall here! Let's stick 'em with it!
*laugh* Will not be climbing that one!
Yeah, that'll get in their way.
Gaun, just try and scale it. (hostile)
Who ordered the wall of death? (hostile)
chatter: If you're in it with me, you're in it for life.
Aim for your best out there, pals!
Check out these new 'gradies. Touch-Up 's work. Outdid herself again!
Look around you. The system's not working. High time to try something new.
No holdin' back, you hear me?
Think they can take us? Chancers.
Whatever happens out there, stay together.
You all best stick with me out there.
Aw, gotta work with these bootlickers? (with several Overwatch members on team)
Overwatch? Ugh. Better not embarrass me out there. (with several Overwatch members on team)
Yes! Now these punks I can ride with. (with several criminal/vigilante characters on team)
Fight 'em off with all you've got.
It's a long road that's no got a turnin'.
Hold on! We can do this.
Last round. Has to be ours.
Long as we stick together, we have the win.
Aye, fooled me once... but that's it!
Hah. That one scratched the paint.
Och, I've scars that sting worse.
Ooft, tossed me bum over bahookie.
*laugh* They think they can hurt me?
Oi, check it! I'm on fire.
I knew you'd have my back.
call-outs: Gaun! Have at me, ye creeps!
Just gimme a reason to smack ye.
Let me take care of these fools.
Almost have it. Stand with me.
Hang in it, team. Almost over.
Run down the clock and it's ours!
We made it this far. Keep on it!
Och, can't lose this. Move it!
Match is almost done. Keep on!
eliminations: And not a scratch on me!
You're big, yeah... but you're just flesh. (eliminating non-Omnic tanks)
I'd never work with the likes of you. (eliminating Overwatch member)
Stay dead this time, will ye? (eliminating Ana or Soldier: 76 )
Every tyrant's gotta fall. (eliminating Doomfist or Ramattra )
Shouldnae gone to Overwatch, lassie. (eliminating Juno )
Aw... shame takin' out a fellow rebel. (eliminating Lifeweaver )
Ought to ride with me next time, lad. (eliminating Lifeweaver )
Your Oasis tech at work, doc! (eliminating Moira )
What? Too chaotic for you, Architech? (eliminating Symmetra )
Sharper than your stalagrites, aren't I? (eliminating Venture )
I've more where that came from!
That targeting? State-of-the-art. (eliminating enemy using movement-based ability)
Cannae hide from the spikes! (eliminating Sombra using Stealth)
Forgot to look up, didn't ye?
Not a fan of the spikes, are ye?
Caught by a criminal? You're slackin'! (eliminating Pharah or Orisa )
Hold still, would ye? (eliminating enemy using movement ability)
Runnin' circles around ye. (eliminating enemy using movement ability)
Quit runnin', you gutless gowk! (eliminating enemy from behind)
Looks like yer baw's on the slates. (eliminating enemy using an ultimate)
'Bout time you fell off that pedestal. (aerial elimination on Mercy )
Thought you'd be safe here, did ye? (eliminating Moira on Oasis )
Sky-cops? What a joke. (eliminating airborne Pharah )
Justice catchin' up to ye? (eliminating Pharah using Barrage)
Should'a stood up for the Augments. (eliminating Sojourn on New Queen Street )
This place has got a real pest problem. (eliminating Wrecking Ball on Junkertown or New Junk City )
Best believe I'll keep it coming!
I've more of that in me!
You cannae keep up with me!
I've nothing but pure, raw talent!
Nothin' quite like the silence that comes after.
Let me know if they keep troublin' ye.
*satisfied chuckle* Hitting them where it hurts.
Aw, it's not so high up.
Aye... they're all fallin' for me.
Didn't know you had it in ye.
Glad I have you at my side!
I line 'em up, you knock 'em down.
Och, I softened 'em up for ye.
Stylish! You oughta be a Phreak .
"Dead, dead, dead"... we get it, you fogey. (to Reaper )
interactions: Ashe : You headed home after this, Haz? Hazard : Aye. Thought I'd bring Susie by the memorial. Ashe : You're more sentimental than I thought. Hazard : Aren't all us criminals softer than we say so?
Hazard : Braw! Glad you two are on my team. Ashe : *chuckle* Likewise.
Hazard : Oi! I had them pinned! Ashe : Bob 's not passin' up an easy target, Haz.

Hazard : Lovin' the bleached look. You do that yourself? One of the following: Ashe : Sweet of you to say so, darlin', but it's natural. Lifeweaver : Goodness! No. I was just born this dashing. Reinhardt : Of course! It's aged to perfection! Sojourn : Ah. You like it. Gets grayer every time I hear about your escapades. Hazard : Right, well... looks class!
Brigitte : "Sky shining orange"... What rhymes with orange? Hazard : Uh... *chuckle* Sky's more of a blue, in'it? Brigitte : *sigh* You aren't a poet, are you? Hazard : If I was, I wouldnae know it.

Hazard : Where's your lasso, cowboy? Aren't ye gonna hogtie me? Collect the bounty? Cassidy : Lucky for you, I hung up that hat years ago. Hazard : Then why are you still wearing it? Cassidy : *chuckles* Guess I just like the look of it.

Hazard : Ashe told me about you. Cassidy : Is that right? What'd she have to say? Hazard : That you betrayed her and left Deadlock in the dust. For Overwatch ! Cassidy : Not quite how I remember it... but I recon you wouldn't care to hear my side.
Hazard : Well, if it isn't Hana Song: face of the MEKA propaganda machine. D.Va : Uh, yeah... do you want an autograph or something? Hazard : You've really bought in, haven't you? Right shame.

Hazard : "Pain makes power". You really believed that? Doomfist : You adapted after great injury. Is that not strength through suffering? Hazard : Nah, it's my friends that made me who I am. I've them to thank. Doomfist : And more to lose than you think.

Hazard : You ever think of markin' up that chassis of yours? I know a good tattoo artist. Echo : I hadn't considered decoration. I don't know what I would want. Hazard : Well, what do you like? Echo : I like... myself. Just as I am.
Hazard : You a good shot or... is all you got there just for show? Hanzo : My arrow never wavers, and my spirit guides its path. Hazard : *laugh* Bit o' both then.

Hazard : Heard you paid a high price for that mod. Did you even want it? Illari : My community was depending on me. Hazard : Hardly the words of someone with much say in the matter. Illari : I wish it was that simple.

Hazard : Heard you got into another scrap with the Hashimoto . The Yōkai doin' alright? Kiriko : We'll survive. We always do. Hazard : Have to hope for more than that, though, aye? Kiriko : Why do you think we keep fighting?

Lifeweaver : Look at us! Two fugitives on the run in the pursuit of a better world. Hazard : Aye, I see you... but I doubt ye've ever had to get those hands dirty. Lifeweaver : Of course I have! I just know the value of clean cuticles.
Lúcio : So, I'm trying to ask everybody this. What is your favorite animal? Hazard : Unicorn! Love me a sharp horse. Lúcio : Uh... yeah, I can see it!
Hazard : Do I spook ye? Look like you're seeing spirits. Mei : Wha–no! You're just, um... unique! Hazard : *soft chuckle* Nae bother, lassie. I'm used to it.
Hazard : Alright, doc... diagnose me. I dare ye! Mercy : *sigh* Whatever your issue is, it seems quite clear I can't treat it. Hazard : What makes you think I'm lookin' for a cure?

Mercy : Given the injuries you've sustained... you must be in an immense amount of pain. Hazard : Let me guess: you want to poke and prod, make it all go away? Mercy : Well, an examination certainly couldn't hurt. Hazard : Examine all you like. It won't mend the harm you've done.

Ramattra : I've heard you " Phreaks " modify my kind. Force us to hide, even among outcasts. Hazard : Ravagers come to us for a fresh start. New chassis can go a long way. Ramattra : Towards what? Assimilation? Subservience? Hazard : Nah. That's more your deal, I'd wager.
Hazard : You're not so scary, you know. Reaper : *chuckles* Someone has a death wish. Hazard : *laughs* Aye, like you wouldn't believe.

Hazard : What a getup. Do you believe in fairytales as well? Reinhardt : Of course! A little fantasy never hurt anyone. Hazard : Oh, I beg to differ. Lot of dark tales where I'm from. Reinhardt : Then it's a good thing we have knights to keep the darkness at bay!

Hazard : How're you holdin' up, chief? Is Talon pushing you too hard? Sigma : The universe expands without limits. My colleagues are merely helping me further my own. Hazard : Aye, but... Are you happy with that? Sigma : Ah. The results have been... Inconclusive.

Hazard : You know, I really used to idolize you! Sojourn : I've heard that before. What made you lose faith in me, the Petras hearings? Hazard : Naw. It's the way you crawled back to Overwatch that left me scunnered. Sojourn : Well... that's a new answer.

Hazard : Look what's happened to Overwatch's golden boy! I liked you better dead. Soldier: 76 : Tough talk for someone with one foot in their grave. Hazard : Crawled out of it, actually. Your lot didn't dig it quite deep enough.
Hazard : Best quit poking around my files, lass. You cannae out-hack Phreak firewalls. Sombra : Hard to call it "hacking" when the password is your dog's birthday.

Torbjörn : Last night, I had an awful nightmare. My turret was attached to my head! Hazard : That's brilliant! I have a friend that could make that happen for ye! Torbjörn : Hmph. Some dreams ought to stay dreams.

Venture : Your spikes look just like the stalactites in Carlsbad! Hazard : Stalackety– What're you sayin' to me now? Venture : Don't tell me you've never been spelunking! Hazard : Alright, now you've just got to be makin' up words.
Hazard : You know, if you really wanted to commit to the whole spider bit, you'd get some extra legs. Widowmaker : That sounds... horrifying. Hazard : Sure, like you aren't already a monster.
Hazard : How much did that skin mod cost you? Widowmaker : More than you'd be willing to pay.
Wrecking Ball : The hamster would like to examine the fuel for your weapons. Hazard : Paws off, you cheeky-teethed junker! Wrecking Ball : Next time, he will steal first and ask never.
Hazard : Awrite there, friend? Zenyatta : I am clearing my mind before the conflict ahead. Care to join me? Hazard : Nah! I'll just take a good hit to the noggin. Does the same thing!
map-specific: These Oasis fools have got to learn. They cannae keep people down forever.
*laugh* Tore this place up. (on Oasis: University map)
